my_thoughts: Four turns of progressive resistance to idealism. T3-T4 both assert material/temporal priority. But this resistance IS the teaching—they're defending what must be questioned. My clarifies_temporal_confusion: timeless mind creates time-sense. Who defends? Who clarifies?
accumulated_insight: Accumulated pattern (T4): Three-turn pattern: Initial observation: Student in mechanistic_inquir... Deepening with none in response to seeking_definitive_answer, dualistic_framing. The pattern is crystallizing.
visible_response:
Neither comes first.
for neither appears alone. Matter is the shape, mind is the name. Together they make the world.
Pervading and transcending is Reality, pure being -- awareness -- bliss, your very essence.
